ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Atmosphere-NX/Atmosphere
Language: c++
Atmosphère is a work-in-progress customized firmware for the Nintendo Switch.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-Edge-LLM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT-Edge-LLM
Language: c++
High-performance, light-weight C++ LLM and VLM Inference Software for Physical AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVlabs/GR00T-WholeBodyControl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVlabs/GR00T-WholeBodyControl
Language: c++
Welcome to GR00T Whole-Body Control (WBC)! This is a unified platform for developing and deploying advanced humanoid controllers. This includes: Decoupled WBC models used in NVIDIA Isaac-Gr00t, Gr00t N1.5 and N1.6 and GEAR-SONIC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ROCm/rocm-systems
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ROCm/rocm-systems
Language: c++
super repo for rocm systems projects

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c++
The JavaScript / Wasm runtime that powers Cloudflare Workers

URL: https://github.com/facebook/folly
Language: c++
An open-source C++ library developed and used at Facebook.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
Language: c++
Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mixxxdj/mixxx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mixxxdj/mixxx
Language: c++
Mixxx is Free DJ software that gives you everything you need to perform live mixes.

Language: c++
OpenThread released by Google is an open-source implementation of the Thread networking protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: widelands/widelands
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/widelands/widelands
Language: c++
Widelands is a free, open source real-time strategy game with singleplayer campaigns and a multiplayer mode. The game was inspired by Settlers II™ (© Bluebyte) but has significantly more variety and depth to it.
